data.title: FTI Consulting Appoints Aurélien Vincent to Lead Financial Services Practice in the Middle East
data.description: On April 8, 2026, FTI Consulting, Inc. unveiled Aurélien Vincent as the new Senior Managing Director in the Strategy & Transformation sector under its Corporate Finance segment. Vincent's appointment marks a strategic move for the company listed on NYSE under the ticker symbol FCN, showcasing their commitment to strengthening their leadership team. With this addition, FTI Consulting aims to enhance their expertise in driving corporate strategy and transformation initiatives to better serve their clients. This development aligns with the company's continued efforts to expand its capabilities and provide top-notch services in the financial sector.

data.title: VGP NV to hold Annual, Special, and Extraordinary Shareholders’ Meeting on 8 May 2026. Save the date!
data.description: In the latest report released, it was disclosed that the unemployment rate has dropped by 0.5%, now standing at 5.3%. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth of 3.2% in the last quarter, marking a significant increase since the previous year. The stock market has also shown a positive trend, with the main index rising by 500 points to reach a record high of 30,000. Experts believe these figures reflect a strong recovery and potential for further growth in the coming months.

data.title: Launch of the Pētersala residential project (Riga, Latvia)
data.description: Merko Ehitus group's subdivision, SIA Merko Mājas, has initiated a residential project in Riga's esteemed Quiet Centre at Pētersalas street 3 and 5. This development will feature four stylish buildings, offering a combined total of 105 new residential units and four commercial spaces. The project is expected to be finalized by the summer of 2028.

data.title: N3XT and Zodia Markets Partner to Enable 24/7 Instant USD Payments Across Zodia's Institutional Digital Asset Ecosystem
data.description: In Cheyenne, Wyoming, N3XT and Zodia Markets have teamed up to offer real-time U.S. dollar settlement for Zodia Markets' clients. N3XT is a blockchain-based narrow bank specializing in quick, programmable B2B payments, while Zodia Markets is a digital asset platform facilitating institutional capital with stablecoins. This partnership aims to address a key challenge in digital asset markets by providing instant settlement for transactions, combating the issues posed by limited banking access and operating hours that often hinder quick settlements.

data.title: RoosterBio and MineBio Life Sciences Partner to Expand Access to Scalable, High Quality MSC and Exosome Bioprocessing Solutions in China
data.description: New collaboration brings RoosterBio's high-quality Research-Grade and CliniControl™ cGMP Media Platforms to China's top cell and gene therapy firms. MineBio has secured import authorization, enabling swift order processing. From Frederick, Md., the partnership was announced on April 8, 2026. This move extends RoosterBio, Inc.'s reach to a significant market and presents immediate fulfillment opportunities.

data.title: The Boys & Girls Clubs of Greater Oxnard and Port Hueneme Announce Ribbon Cutting for New Premier America Boys & Girls Club
data.description: The Boys & Girls Clubs of Greater Oxnard and Port Hueneme (BGCOP) is excited to share the success of the "Believe in our Next Generation" campaign, which has helped bring to fruition the vision for the perfect youth building in Oxnard, California. The ribbon cutting ceremony for the newly transformed Premier America building took place on April 7, 2026. This initiative reflects the strong commitment of BGCOP to the youth in the community, showcasing their dedication to providing a safe and nurturing environment for the next generation.

data.title: Investigative reporter searches 18 months to uncover bitcoin creator's identity, Satoshi Nakamoto.
data.description: Over the course of 18 months, investigative reporter John Carreyrou delved into the digital cryptography world to uncover the true identity of Satoshi Nakamoto, the enigmatic creator behind bitcoin.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Bitcoin ETF to launch with record-low 0.14% fee, cheaper than others on the market.
data.description: With a fee of just 0.14%, the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust is set to become the most affordable Bitcoin ETF available. This ultra-low fee is expected to make it an attractive option for investors looking to gain exposure to Bitcoin through an ETF.

data.title: Anthropic restricts AI model access due to cybersecurity concerns; models can outperform most humans in exploiting software flaws.
data.description: Anthropic reported that artificial intelligence models have advanced to a point where they possess coding abilities that enable them to outperform most humans in detecting and capitalizing on software vulnerabilities.

data.title: Trade Desk Stock Rebounds After-Hours: Here's Why TTD Is Trending Tonight
data.description: The cloud-based demand-side platform, The Trade Desk Inc. (NASDAQ: TTD), saw its shares fluctuate significantly on Wednesday. Following a 6.80% drop during the regular session, the stock recovered by 3.38% in after-hours trading on Tuesday, reaching $21.40. This uptick came amidst a notable leadership exodus, with four key figures leaving the company. According to a report from Adweek on Tuesday, the departure includes three senior executives. Departing after seven years, CMO Ian Colley mentioned he is leaving to pursue a new opportunity. Anna Sayre, an internal marketer, will take over his role. Additionally, communications executive Melinda Zurich and senior vice president of consumer products Matthew Henick are also stepping down alongside Colley. Board director Lise J. Buyer had previously resigned, with her departure effective Apr. 3. For more details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.
